name: Maharagwe (Spiced Beans in Coconut Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, deep pot.
2. Cook the onion gently until golden and soft.
3. Partially mash the cooked peas with a fork and add them to the cooking onions.
4. Add the tomatoes and mix well.
5. Stir in turmeric, chili powder, salt, and half the cilantro.
6. Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine all ingredients.
7. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Garnish with remaining cilantro.
9. Serve over rice.
